text: CLOSED (both phases). Phase 1: design doc docs/spectral-backend-boundary.md (committed 24c4d22) — adversarially reviewed, 3 confirmed errors fixed incl. the private[gale]-subpackage-visibility misconception and the corrected infinite-eigenvalue conformance law (|Bx| not |Ax|). Phase 2: skeleton implemented per the doc's migration sketch (committed HEAD): private[spectral] tightening (compile-proven nothing outside gale.spectral constructs the result types), SpectralBackend trait + none given + compose combinator, raw carriers + BackendConvergence, GeneralizedEigenDecomposition with projective (alpha,beta) SoA and beta-equality pairing, cross-multiplication projective sorter with beta>=0 guarded as a loud Left(InvalidArgument) (reviewer proved a negative beta breaks comparator totality -> TimSort crash), eigGeneralizedNonsymmetric QZ seam + rank-deficient GSVD routing, facade-re-derived right AND left homogeneous residuals with hand-computed nonzero-value tests (sqrt50 complex-pair, |alpha||Bx|=2 infinite, left-residual=2 honesty case). Two adversarial reviews across the phases; all P1 fixes applied. Deferred per doc: acceleration using-wiring for existing ops, the laws conformance kit (QZ law family), Backend.spectral v0.5 bridge, real backends. Verified: coreJVM 324/324, coreJS 321/321, laws 29/29 both, parity 29/29.
